name: Medical Billing Services
tagline: Verified medical billing services, independently rated.
description: The most comprehensive directory of CHBME- and AAPC-credentialed medical billing services, revenue cycle management companies, and healthcare billing specialists in the United States.
certifications: CHBME (Certified Healthcare Billing and Management Executive — HBMA)
CBCS (Certified Billing and Coding Specialist — NHA)
cityPagePromptContext:
Medical billing services handle end-to-end revenue cycle management for physician practices, clinics, and health systems.
Credentialed professionals (CHBME, CPC, CCS) perform medical coding, claims
submission, denial management, and payment posting on behalf of providers.
Practice managers and clinic administrators hire them when opening a new practice,
after denial rates climb above acceptable thresholds, or to offload administrative
overhead entirely. Detailed reporting tracks clean claim rates, days in AR,
and net collection ratios so practices can benchmark performance over time.
buyerSearchContext: when launching a new practice, after experiencing rising claim denial rates, or when seeking to reduce in-house billing overhead and improve collections

editorialAuthor.name: Nick Palmer
editorialAuthor.title: Founder & Lead Researcher
editorialAuthor.bio: Nick built this directory to help practice managers find credentialed medical billing services without wading through generalist agencies that lack healthcare-specific expertise — a frustration he ran into when evaluating RCM vendors for a specialty clinic and couldn’t find an unbiased, credential-verified source.

schema.label: CHBME Certified
schema.scrape_hint: Look for 'CHBME' designation, HBMA membership badge, or explicit mention of Certified Healthcare Billing and Management Executive credential on homepage, about page, or team bios.

schema.label: Years in Business
schema.scrape_hint: Extract from 'About Us', founding year statements, or '15+ years serving providers' copy; calculate from founding year if business start date is provided.

schema.label: Staff Certifications
schema.scrape_hint: Scan certifications section, team credentials, or credential logos for AAPC, AHIMA, AMBA, or NHA designations; match exact acronyms and full names from staff bios or credentials pages.

schema.label: Medical Specialties Served
schema.scrape_hint: Parse specialties menu, 'Industries We Serve' section, or homepage bullets; match keywords like 'orthopedic billing', 'mental health billing', or 'multi-specialty practice'.

schema.label: Billing Model
schema.scrape_hint: Extract from pricing page, FAQ, or 'How We Charge' sections; look for phrases like '6% of collections', 'flat fee per month', or 'per claim submitted'.

schema.label: Denial Management & Appeals
schema.scrape_hint: Check for mentions of 'denial management', 'claim appeals', 'AR recovery', or 'denial resolution' in services list or methodology pages.

schema.label: EHR Integrations
schema.scrape_hint: Scan integrations, technology, or software partner sections for named EHR platforms; look for logos or 'we work with' lists on the homepage or services page.

schema.label: Phone Number
schema.scrape_hint: Extract from header, footer, contact page, or click-to-call buttons; normalize to standard format (e.g., (555) 123-4567).

schema.label: Website
schema.scrape_hint: Capture primary domain from browser address bar, homepage links, or business listings; ensure full URL with https:// protocol.
